findings.title: Reentrancy / external call review
findings.description: External value/token calls that may require checks-effects-interactions or reentrancy protection.
findings.advice: Ensure state updates happen before external calls and affected functions use nonReentrant where needed.

findings.title: Access control review
findings.description: Public/external admin-like functions or role logic that may need authorization review.
findings.advice: Confirm privileged operations have correct access control and no inverse/threshold logic bug.

findings.title: Oracle manipulation / spot-price risk
findings.description: Potential use of spot AMM reserves/slot0 or missing staleness/TWAP protections.
findings.advice: Confirm TWAP/staleness/liquidity bounds; spot prices are unsafe for lending/liquidation decisions.

findings.title: Unchecked low-level or token call
findings.description: Low-level/token transfer calls may ignore success or non-standard ERC20 returns.
findings.advice: Check return values or use SafeERC20 / explicit require(success).

findings.title: Accounting/share math review
findings.description: Share, index, exchange-rate, or rounding math that may cause accounting drift.
findings.advice: Manually validate rounding direction, empty-market edge cases, and share-price manipulation.

findings.title: Initialization / upgradeability review
findings.description: Upgradeable contracts need initialization guards and safe upgrade authorization.
findings.advice: Confirm initializer cannot be replayed and implementation is locked.
